improvements: Confirmed that the UI selection and backend routing both use claude-sonnet-4-6 after the pin change.
Captured the real blocker precisely: the live submit prompt was mangled by the local automation harness before it reached the model.

notes: POST /api/v1/smart returned 200 with model_id=claude-sonnet-4-6, but the prompt in the captured request body was corrupted into question marks.

error: SMART live submit consumed quota, but the request prompt was mangled by the local PowerShell-to-Python harness, so the returned EV answer was off-target and the batch acceptance criteria were not met.
